creator: DougB@gorean.org
text:
The net/p5-URI port is out of date. The attched patch updates it
	to 1.08 which is the latest version.

Fix: Apply the following patch:




(Yes, this is a hideously simple update, but PR's are the only things 
that seem to get noticed....)

Doug--TBBLqGjjbsvHk1nulttU2RvBKONuPUZjzXYZEGcB0xgNT91Y
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/ncvs/ports/net/p5-URI/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.11
diff -u -r1.11 Makefile
--- Makefile	2000/07/22 10:44:52	1.11
+++ Makefile	2000/08/16 21:32:48
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	URI
-PORTVERSION=	1.07
+PORTVERSION=	1.08
 CATEGORIES=     net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=     URI
Index: files/md5
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/ncvs/ports/net/p5-URI/files/md5,v
retrieving revision 1.5
diff -u -r1.5 md5
--- files/md5	2000/07/22 10:44:52	1.5
+++ files/md5	2000/08/16 21:33:18
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (URI-1.07.tar.gz) = 837b4ecc0da19a0cdb7dece3904a0a6b
+MD5 (URI-1.08.tar.gz) = effece7a1ef3812c2d95ccc199c5f08c
How-To-Repeat: 
	DNA
